name: pc-monitor-mvp
description: PC metrics MVP — desktop agent, backend, realtime dashboard

scripts.dev:raw: concurrently -n server,agent,dashboard -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w agent" "npm run dev -w dashboard"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,agent,dashboard "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w agent" "npm run start -w dashboard"
